movie.actors: Bruce Willis, Jai Courtney, Sebastian Koch, Mary Elizabeth Winstead
movie.plot: Iconoclastic, take-no-prisoners cop John McClane, for the first time, finds himself on foreign soil after traveling to Moscow to help his wayward son Jack - unaware that Jack is really a highly-trained CIA operative out to stop a nuclear weapons heist. With the Russian underworld in pursuit, and battling a countdown to war, the two McClanes discover that their opposing methods make them unstoppable heroes.
movie.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
movie.writer: Skip Woods, Roderick Thorp (certain original characters by)
